text:
A report to be provided by [name of agency] by 4.00pm on [date].

Police disclosure by 4.00pm on [date].

Settlement conference

The parties having read the settlement conference information and filing their signed consents to a settlement conference, the matter is listed for a settlement conference at The Family Court sitting at [court name] at [time] on [date] before [name of judge] allowing [number] hours, the parties and advocates to attend at [time].

Any person being assessed as special guardian should be invited to attend the settlement conference.

The local authority should ensure that an official able to authorise any change to the care plan attends the settlement conference.

No party shall file any position statements prior to the settlement conference.

The parties having read the settlement conference information but not consenting to a settlement conference, a settlement conference is not directed.  In the event that the parties do all consent they must by 4.00pm on [date] send their signed consent form to the court together with a request for a settlement conference to be listed on a date prior to the final hearing date.

Sibling assessment

The local authority shall by 4.00pm on [date] file at court and send to the parties a sibling assessment which shall recommend whether the children should be placed together or separately, and if not placed together the recommended combinations and contact arrangements.

Solicitor ceasing to act for a party

(declaration and order as follows)

THE COURT DECLARES THAT:

[Name of firm] have ceased to be the solicitors for [name of party].

(within the body of the order)

[Name] must forthwith send to the court an address for service.

Special guardianship

Any application by [name] for a special guardianship order shall be issued by 4.00pm on [date], whereupon [it will be listed for a permission hearing] / [the issue of permission to apply will be determined at the hearing on [date] provided for above].

Permission is given to [name] to apply for a special guardianship order for [name(s) of child(ren)]. The application shall be heard in these proceedings, and [name] is joined as a party to the proceedings.

The local authority shall by 4.00pm on [date] file at court, serve on the parties, and send to the person assessed a special guardianship report.
